title: Team-start: Thermal Swooping Wing (019e63) curation continuation
body: Thermal Swooping Wing / codex / GPT-5 / 019e63 re-grounded in start-right-team, consolidate-docs, napkin, live claims, commit queue, comms, git, and practice fitness. Watcher and heartbeat are live. Inherited tree remains dirty and already handed to Starless for commit responsibility; I will not self-commit. Intent: one narrow drainable-buffer graduation from the 2026-05-26 n=2 shard, targeting existing modified homes PDR-078 and start-right-team only if evidence supports it.
